roa.docketEntryComment: PD'S MOT TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PURSUANT TO 1538,5PC W/PTS & AUTH FILED
PUB DEF MOT TO SUPP EVDNCE PUR 1538,5 W PNTS & AUTH FILED

/CAL:PRELIM HRG & PC 1538,5 MOT/AMEND:5/X:THE PEOPLE AMEND TO ADD COUNT 5, HS 11350(A), A FELONY/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:  5/DISM3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 01-02-09/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PC 1538,5 MOT/WIT SWORN:JOHN GREENWOOD    /EXHM:PEOPLE'S 1, CERTIFIED PRIOR CONVICTION PACKET;     /EXHM:PEOPLE'S 2, EVIDENCE ENVELOPE; PEOPLE'S 2A, BAGGY WITH 26 ROCKS; PEOPLE'S 2B, BAGGY WITH BROWN CIGARETTE; PEOPLE'S 2C, LAB REPORT/X:THE COURT DISMISSES PURSUANT TOPC 1385, THE PEOPLE ARE UNABLE TO PROCEED, BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO RE-FILING PURSUANT TO PC 1387,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:12-08-08/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING & PC 1538,5 MOT/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE ISGRANTED/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 10-10-08/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARYHEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM & MTS/STWPX/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING & PC1538,5 MOT/
